name: integration__vision_api_wrapper_factory__last_upd
method: # Vision API Wrapper Factory  **Last updated:** 2026-02-27 **Purpose:** Build 10 niche camera apps that wrap powerful vision APIs behind beautiful, niche-specific mobile UIs. Each app is a separate $4

phases.name: niche_research
steps: scrape App Store for camera/ID app gaps
rank niches by search volume vs competition

phases.name: template_build
steps: create vision-app base template with camera capture + API call + result display

phases.name: app_generation
steps: generate 10 niche variants from template (plant-id, food-cal, bird-id, rock-id, insect-id, dog-breed, car-id, skin-check, art-id, mushroom-id)

phases.name: deploy
steps: submit iOS builds via existing Capacitor pipeline
